questionHtml:
What occurs during meiosis but not mitosis?

A. Spindles are formed from microtubules.

B. Chromosome number is conserved.

C. Homologous chromosomes pair up.

D. Centromeres split.

meta.title: What occurs during meiosis but not mitosis? A. Spindles are formed from microtubules. B. Chromosome number is conserved. C. Homologous chromosomes pair up. D. Centromeres split.
